vol_description: Longitudinal study of infant cognitive and motor development, social cognition, self-regulation, attachment and attention and perception from 6 - 30 months of age. The dataset include example videos from each age along with a brief description of each task. The child shown in the videos is just one out of all the children and is not to be seen as an example of how all the children performed. It is just to show how the tasks where administrated.  The eye-tracking tasks are recorded with a screen recorder and the frame rate may therefor differ slightly from the original stimulus.
